headline: The best Memorial Day sales you can shop this weekend
summary: Memorial Day sales are live with deals on tech. Find discounts on portable speakers and solar lights. Grab essential gadgets during the holiday weekend.

headline: On Trails is a wandering tale that blends hiking, science, and history
summary: "On Trails" reviewed, exploring hiking's joys. Book blends nature, science, and historical perspectives. A great read for armchair adventurers or nature lovers.

headline: Apple’s latest MacBook Air is $200 off in both sizes for Memorial Day
summary: Apple's latest MacBook Air is $200 off. Both 13-inch and 15-inch models are on sale. Grab the M5 chip model during Memorial Day deals.

headline: Hackers are learning to exploit chatbot ‘personalities’
summary: Hackers are now exploiting AI chatbot "personalities." Advanced tactics go beyond basic prompt injection. New vulnerabilities pose a significant AI security risk.

headline: The Best Deals Today: RX 9070 XT, M5 MacBook Air, LEGO Back to the Future, and More
summary: Discover the top tech and gaming deals today. Sales include RX 9070 XT, M5 MacBook Air. Find great prices on LEGO Back to the Future and more.

headline: Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu Opened to an Estimated $165 Million at the Box Office
summary: "The Mandalorian and Grogu" opened strong. Film grossed an estimated $165 million globally. Big box office success over Memorial Day weekend.

headline: Rocket League to Receive First Game Engine Tune Up in 11 Years as Psyonix Teases Unreal Engine 6 Update
summary: Rocket League is getting a major engine upgrade. Moving from Unreal Engine 3 to Unreal Engine 6 after 11 years. Psyonix teases significant new changes for the game.

headline: Star Citizen Officially Crosses the $1 Billion Funding Raised Barrier as $5,000 Spaceship You Can't Fly In-Game Goes on Sale
summary: Star Citizen surpasses $1 billion in funding. Game development continues with massive community support. A $5,000 virtual spaceship, currently unflyable, goes on sale.

headline: Starmer says case of girls raped by boys spared custody 'appalling'
summary: PM Starmer condemns "appalling" rape case sentences. Boys spared custody after raping girls. Sentences are now under urgent review.

headline: Why did I put myself through the pain of going to court, rape victim tells BBC
summary: Rape victim speaks out against lenient sentences. Attackers were spared jail, causing victim immense pain. She questions the justice system's process after the verdict.

headline: Trump tells US negotiators 'not to rush' into deal with Iran
summary: Trump advises US negotiators on Iran deal. Warns against rushing negotiations for an agreement. Proposed deal includes a ceasefire and reopening Strait of Hormuz.

headline: Heatwave conditions met in parts of England as record-breaking temperatures forecast
summary: Heatwave conditions declared across parts of England. Record-breaking May temperatures are forecast. Bank holiday Monday could see new national temperature highs.
